title: The Way Home
tmdbOverview: This is the story of a 7-year-old boy, Sang-woo, born and raised in the big city, and his mute grandmother, who has spent her whole life in a small rural village.
synopsis: The Way Home (2002) is a drama, family and k-drama film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
